title: Trying to create the same ›has-video‹ relationship again
gherkin:
Given there exists a "RACING GAME" "Assetto Corsa"
And there exists a "VIDEO" "Promo Video"
And there exists a "has-video" relationship between "Assetto Corsa" and "Promo Video"
When the user creates a "has-video" relationship between "Assetto Corsa" and "Promo Video"
Then the response should return with status code 304
